The Song

Community
The Economy
The Tech
GRANAT
The first artifact in human history
created by the entire planet.
Five continents. Five artists trusted by millions. Fans record their voices. AI weaves a billion voices into a single song. Every participant can hear themselves inside it. A precedent that has never existed.
How It Works
From Your Voice to the Artifact
01. Artists on each continent record their part.
02. You open the app, sing, and your voice is uploaded.
03. AI corrects pitch, removes noise, blends all voices — not averaging, but conducting.
04. The artifact is born: a song where the entire planet sings together.
Your Voice
12 Dimensions of Uniqueness
Your voice isn't just a sound wave — it's a fingerprint across 12 dimensions. Pitch, resonance, tremor, timbre, breath, neural signature... No other voice on the planet can replicate yours. Unique as DNA. Private as thought.
The Vision
The Listener Becomes the Creator
This is not a streaming platform. Not a social network. The old chain — Artist → Label → Streaming → Listener — is over. In Granat, fans become co-creators. Your voice is inside the song. You're part of the artifact.
The Evolution
From One Song to a Universe
The Song — a billion voices create history.
The Movement — GranatFest on 5 continents.
The Industry — co-creators share in the success.
The Universe — where participation has economic value. Not a handout — a hand raised.
Not a consumer. A creator.
Let's create history together
